arts.ttl: Leeds United miss out on ‘target’, but he could do Daniel Farke a huge favour next month
arts.sum: Leeds United were one of the many Championship clubs linked with a move to sign Louie Barry from Aston Villa, but he has instead opted to join Hull City, who have just helped the Whites’ promotion bid by beating Sheffield United. It comes after a big favour from Hull City to beat Sheffield United and Plymouth Argyle to snatch a draw at Sunderland previously this gameweek.

arts.ttl: Neil Warnock may have a point about Leeds United, Burnley ‘agreement’ after Sky Sports quip
arts.sum: After Sheffield United were well-beaten 3-0 at home to Hull City on Friday, ex-Blades and Leeds United manager joked that both sides tonight might play for a draw at Turf Moor to benefit themselves. Post-match, former Sheffield United and Leeds boss Neil Warnock was part of the Sky Sports panel picking apart the Blades’ hefty home defeat.
